scripts.dev: bun run --filter='@lostgradient/markdown' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/commentary' build && bun run --filter='@lostgradient/cinder' build && bun run --filter='@lostgradient/chat' build && bun --watch run src/playground-server.ts
scripts.test: bun run --filter='@lostgradient/markdown' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/commentary' build && bun run --filter='@lostgradient/cinder' build && bun run --filter='@lostgradient/chat' build && bun run scripts/run-tests.ts
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter='@lostgradient/markdown' build && tsc --noEmit && bunx svelte-check --tsconfig tsconfig.json --threshold error
scripts.validate: bun run --filter='@lostgradient/markdown' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/commentary' build && bun run --filter='@lostgradient/cinder' build && bun run --filter='@lostgradient/chat' build && bun run scripts/check-raw-native-controls.ts --strict && bun run src/validate-playground.ts
scripts.vercel-build: bun run --filter='@lostgradient/markdown' build && bun run --filter='@cinder/commentary' build && bun run --filter='@lostgradient/cinder' build && bun run --filter='@lostgradient/chat' build && bun run scripts/static-export.ts
